query_metadata.original_query: Track medication pattern and identify health conditions

response.sql_generated: SELECT m."MEDICATION_DESCRIPTION", m."REASONCODE", m."REASONDESCRIPTION", c."CONDITION_DESCRIPTION", c."CONDITION_CODE"
